title: Demo GRE Mathematics Subject Test Set B
description: A second demonstration bank for testing the problem-set chooser on the welcome screen.

questions.question_markdown: What is the remainder when $7^{103}$ is divided by $6$?
A circle has radius $3$. What is its area?
questions.solution_markdown:
The area of a circle is $\pi r^2$. With $r=3$,

$$\pi(3^2)=9\pi.$$

questions.question_markdown: A fair coin is tossed twice. What is the probability of getting exactly one head?
questions.solution_markdown:
The equally likely outcomes are $HH$, $HT$, $TH$, and $TT$. Exactly one head occurs in $HT$ and $TH$, so the probability is

$$\frac{2}{4}=\frac{1}{2}.$$

Use the product rule:

$$f'(x)=(x^2)'\sin x + x^2(\sin x)' = 2x\sin x + x^2\cos x.$$

questions.question_markdown: If $x + \frac{1}{x} = 3$, what is the value of $x^2 + \frac{1}{x^2}$?
questions.solution_markdown:
Square the given expression:

$$\left(x + \frac{1}{x}\right)^2 = x^2 + 2 + \frac{1}{x^2} = 9.$$

Therefore,

$$x^2 + \frac{1}{x^2} = 7.$$
